title: M.Tech Electronics Engineering (Advanced Communication Technology)
content: The M.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Advanced Communication Technology) is a two-year postgraduate program that focuses on cutting-edge communication technologies such as 5G/6G networks, optical fiber communication, AI-based communication systems, and satellite technology. This program is designed for students who wish to deepen their knowledge and specialize in advanced fields of communication. The curriculum includes advanced theoretical concepts, research methodologies, and practical applications. Graduates can pursue careers in telecom, defense, aerospace, research, and academia. The demand for communication engineers is increasing with advancements in 6G and Terahertz Communication, Quantum Computing and Cryptography, Autonomous Vehicle Communication, AI and IoT-based Smart Communication Networks This M.Tech program opens doors for higher research (Ph.D.) and provides opportunities to work on government projects, and multinational telecom companies. B.E/B.Tech in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks or equivalent Students with a CUET / GATE score will be given preference in the merit list. 01 To independently carry out research /investigation and development work to solve practical problems 02 To write and present a substantial technical report/document 03 To demonstrate a degree of mastery over the area as per the specialization of the program. The mastery should be at a level higher than the requirements in the appropriate bachelor program 04 To function effectively as an individual or as a member or leader in a team 05 To keep abreast with state of art technologies through lifelong learning 01 Apply concepts of mathematics in Communication especially Wireless Communication Technologies, Signal processing 02 Solve issues in the real world of communication sectors, and develop feasible and viable communication systems. 03 Inculcate effective communication skills, team work, and professional ethics and pursue a career in research. 01 Analyze, Design and implement advanced communication systems, apply knowledge of emerging wireless technologies, and adapt to evolving technologies in the Communication field.
